impact: Provides the second source-backed permit-process model needed for trade permits requiring plan review, covering missing facts, document/file checks, process stages, and guarded DevHub actions without live crawl or authenticated automation.
summary: Add deterministic PP&D trade-permit-with-plan-review permit-process fixture.
target_task: Task checkbox-36: Add a second permit-process fixture for a PP&D trade permit with plan review, including required facts, required documents, file rules, stages, and citation-backed action gates.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
